CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To Ccp 337.31 To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff Yvonne Lapenias
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Idin Kashefipour, Esq. (415-318-5709) of Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Moving party SHUNN CALDWELL, WAYNE JACKSON, SIRENA GIPSON.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff reports matter is uncontested in Open Court.The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHUNN CALDWELL, WAYNE JACKSON, SIRENA GIPSON Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiff Pursuant To CCP 337.31 To Substitute A Successor In Interest On Behalf Of Deceased Named Plaintiff Yvonne Lapenias is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court.Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
